summary: Systematic frontend testing of all 10 main hub pages. Tested all tabs, buttons, and API calls. Dashboard, Cucina, Prima Nota, Fornitori, Fatture, Fisco, Contabilità, RiconciliazioneUnificata all working correctly. Found 2 backend bugs in /dipendenti tabs (Retribuzione/Cedolini and Contratti) that show empty states silently. SAIMA/MEPA/Backup tracciabilità routes confirmed working at correct sub-endpoints. Backup.py DB_NAME error was from previous server process, now fixed.

critical.issue: Returns 404 'Dipendente non trovato' when called with IDs from the `dipendenti` collection. Cedolini endpoint validates employee existence in `employees` collection, but GestioneDipendentiUnificata.jsx loads employees from `dipendenti` collection — these use different IDs. All 34 employees in `dipendenti` fail this check.
critical.rca: Two separate MongoDB collections: `dipendenti` (34 records, used by /api/dipendenti) and `employees` (attendance system, different IDs). The /api/cedolini/dipendente/{id} endpoint checks `employees` collection first and raises 404 if not found. Fix: check `dipendenti` collection as fallback, OR return empty array instead of 404.

critical.issue: Returns 404 'Dipendente non trovato' — FastAPI route ordering bug. The dynamic route GET /{dipendente_id} is defined at line 499 in dipendenti.py, BEFORE the static route GET /contratti at line 1406. FastAPI matches /contratti against /{dipendente_id} with dipendente_id='contratti', then looks for employee with id='contratti' → not found → 404.
critical.rca: Route ordering bug: all sub-resource static routes (/contratti, and any others defined after line 499) that are single-path-segment must be moved BEFORE the /{dipendente_id} dynamic route. Only the GET /contratti route is affected (2-segment paths like /contratti/scadenze work fine). Fix: move @router.get('/contratti') to before line 499.

minor.issue: Missing key prop in Fornitori component's SupplierCard list render. Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop'. Non-blocking.

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'Nessun cedolino per 2026' due to backend 404 on /api/cedolini/dipendente/{id}. Console has AxiosError but no visible error to user. Feature effectively broken for all employees.

Shows 'Nessun contratto registrato' due to backend 404 on /api/dipendenti/contratti?dipendente_id={id}. Console has AxiosError but no visible error to user. Feature effectively broken for all employees.

pages_tested.Dashboard (/): PASS — All data loading, auto-repair button works, navigation buttons work, no console errors
pages_tested.Tracciabilità (/tracciabilita): PASS — Iframe loading, SAIMA/MEPA/Backup API sub-endpoints all 200
pages_tested.Cucina (/cucina): PASS — All 4 tabs (Ricettario, FoodCost, Catalogo Ordini, Prodotti Vendita) working
pages_tested.Prima Nota (/prima-nota): PASS — Banca/Cassa tabs working, all action buttons functional
pages_tested.Fornitori (/fornitori): PASS — All 3 tabs working, Previsioni Acquisti data loading
pages_tested.Fatture (/fatture): PASS — All 3 tabs working (Archivio, Import/PEC, Corrispettivi)
pages_tested.Dipendenti (/dipendenti): PARTIAL — Employee list loads, tabs visible, but Retribuzione/Cedolini and Contratti tabs broken (backend 404s)
pages_tested.Fisco (/fisco): PASS — All 6 tabs working (IVA, F24, Ric. F24, Codici, Cespiti, Scadenze)
pages_tested.Contabilità (/contabilita): PASS — All 12 tabs working, Piano dei Conti data loaded
pages_tested.Riconciliazione Unificata (/riconciliazi: PASS — All 8 tabs working (Dashboard, Banca, Assegni, F24, Fatture Aruba, Stipendi, Documenti, PayPal)

action_items: FIX HIGH: /api/cedolini/dipendente/{id} — Add fallback to check `dipendenti` collection OR return empty array (status 200) instead of raising 404 when employee not in `employees` collection

FIX HIGH: /api/dipendenti/contratti route ordering — Move @router.get('/contratti') definition to BEFORE @router.get('/{dipendente_id}') in /app/app/routers/employees/dipendenti.py (move from line 1406 to before line 499)
MINOR: Fix missing React key props in Fornitori/SupplierCard list render
critical_code_review_comments: dipendenti.py: FastAPI route ordering bug — static route /contratti (line 1406) defined AFTER dynamic /{dipendente_id} (line 499). Starlette matches in order, so GET /contratti hits /{dipendente_id} with id='contratti' → 404. Move all static sub-resource routes before the dynamic route.

cedolini.py: Employee collection mismatch — endpoint validates in `employees` collection but the app's HR module uses `dipendenti` collection. Two separate collections with non-overlapping IDs. Should add collection fallback or restructure validation.

success_rate.backend: 80% (2 critical endpoints failing for dipendenti tabs)
success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, all tabs clickable, only dipendenti cedolini/contratti show empty due to backend 404s)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs are in the /dipendenti module: (1) FastAPI route ordering bug in /app/app/routers/employees/dipendenti.py — GET /contratti at line 1406 must be moved before GET /{dipendente_id} at line 499. (2) cedolini.py endpoint validates employee in wrong collection. All other pages (Dashboard, Cucina, Prima Nota, Fornitori, Fatture, Fisco, Contabilità, Riconciliazione, Tracciabilità) are fully working. No auth issues (RequireAuth disabled).

contratti_404.root_cause: FastAPI route definition order matters. In /app/app/routers/employees/dipendenti.py, @router.get('/{dipendente_id}') is defined at line 499 before @router.get('/contratti') at line 1406. Starlette routing engine tries routes in order of definition. When GET /dipendenti/contratti is requested, it matches /{dipendente_id} with dipendente_id='contratti'. The handler then queries MongoDB for employee with id='contratti' → not found → HTTPException 404.
contratti_404.fix: Move lines 1406-1575 (@router.get('/contratti') and related sub-routes) to BEFORE line 499 (@router.get('/{dipendente_id}'))

cedolini_404.root_cause: Two separate MongoDB collections: `dipendenti` (main HR collection, 34 records) and `employees` (attendance system, fewer records). GestioneDipendentiUnificata.jsx loads from /api/dipendenti (reads `dipendenti` collection). When Retribuzione tab calls /api/cedolini/dipendente/{id}, the endpoint validates in `employees` collection (db['employees'].find_one({'id': dipendente_id})). IDs don't overlap between collections.
cedolini_404.reproduction: Select any employee from GestioneDipendenti → click Retribuzione → console shows 404
cedolini_404.fix: Option A: In cedolini.py, change employee lookup to also check `dipendenti` collection: dip = await db['employees'].find_one({'id': id}) or await db['dipendenti'].find_one({'id': id}). Option B: Return empty cedolini list (200) when employee not found in employees collection.
